board_instruction: Board any yellow danfo heading to CMS. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'Marina'.
alight_landmark: CMS Bus Stop, opposite First Bank on Lagos Island
alight_instruction: Drop when you see the overhead bridge at CMS. The bus stops right there.
notes: Avoid 7–9am and 4–7pm. Traffic on the Third Mainland can double journey time.

board_landmark: Yaba Bus Stop, near Herbert Macaulay junction
board_instruction: Board a danfo going to Oshodi. Tell the conductor 'Oshodi'.
alight_landmark: Oshodi Terminal 2, opposite the overhead bridge
alight_instruction: Drop at Oshodi — you'll see the large interchange. Walk to the Ikeja-bound side.
notes: Danfos to Oshodi are frequent — you won't wait long.

board_instruction: Board a danfo going to Ikeja Along. Tell the conductor 'Ikeja Along' or 'Computer Village'.
alight_landmark: Ikeja Along bus stop, near Unity Road junction
alight_instruction: Drop at Ikeja Along — the bus will stop at the junction. You're in Ikeja.

board_instruction: Board the BRT bus to TBS. Pay at the terminal booth — do not pay inside the bus.
alight_landmark: TBS BRT Stop (Tinubu Square, Lagos Island)
alight_instruction: Ride to the last stop at TBS. Exit from the right side of the bus.
notes: BRT buses run every 10–15 minutes. Buy your ticket at the terminal kiosk before boarding.

board_landmark: TBS Bus Stop, near the fountain roundabout
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Victoria Island. Tell the conductor 'VI' or 'Eko Hotel'.
alight_landmark: Victoria Island bus stop, near Eko Hotel junction
alight_instruction: Drop off when you see Eko Hotel on your left. That's central VI.
notes: VI danfos are frequent during work hours but slow in evening rush.

board_landmark: Lekki Phase 1 Gate bus stop (Admiralty Way entrance)
board_instruction: Board any danfo heading towards CMS or Lagos Island. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'Ozumba'.
alight_landmark: Ozumba Mbadiwe Bus Stop, opposite First Bank
alight_instruction: Drop at Ozumba — look for the big junction with the petrol station. Cross to the other side for the next bus.
notes: Morning traffic on Lekki-Epe Expressway can be brutal. Leave before 6:30am or after 9am.

board_instruction: Board a danfo going to CMS. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'Marina'.
alight_landmark: CMS Bus Stop, Lagos Island — near First Bank head office
alight_instruction: Drop at CMS — the bus ends near the flyover. You've arrived at Lagos Island.
notes: The stretch from V/I to CMS moves faster than Lekki to V/I.

board_instruction: Board the BRT bus heading to Oshodi or TBS. Buy your ticket at the terminal kiosk — fare is paid upfront.
alight_instruction: Ride all the way to Oshodi Terminal. Exit onto the main interchange — you're at Oshodi.
notes: BRT from Ikorodu is the fastest option. Buses run every 20–30 minutes from 5:30am. Avoid peak hours (7–9am) if possible.

board_landmark: Aguda Bus Stop, Adeniran Ogunsanya Street (near Shoprite Surulere)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Oshodi. Tell the conductor 'Oshodi'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Oshodi — the bus stops under or near the bridge. Head to the Ikeja-bound bus park.
notes: There are direct danfos from Aguda to Oshodi — no need to change at Ojuelegba.

board_landmark: Pen Cinema Bus Stop, Agege (Old Abeokuta Motor Road)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Oshodi or Ikeja. Tell the conductor 'Oshodi'.
alight_landmark: Oshodi Terminal, near the BRT platform
alight_instruction: Drop at Oshodi and walk to the BRT boarding platform on the far side of the terminal.

board_landmark: Maryland Bus Stop, Ikorodu Road (opposite Maryland Mall)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to CMS, Lagos Island, or TBS. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'TBS'.
alight_instruction: The bus travels down Ikorodu Road past Ojota and over the bridge. Drop at CMS.
notes: Direct danfos to CMS run frequently from Maryland. The journey covers Ojota, Anthony, and the bridge.

board_landmark: Festac Interchange Bus Stop (1st Avenue junction)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Mile 2. Tell the conductor 'Mile 2' or 'Cele'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Mile 2. The Cele junction is a busy interchange — cross to the appropriate bus stop for your next leg.

board_landmark: Mile 2 Bus Stop, CMS-bound side (near the filling station)
board_instruction: Board a danfo going to CMS or Apapa Road. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'Marina'.
alight_instruction: Drop at CMS near the overhead bridge. Watch for the conductor's signal.
notes: The road from Mile 2 to CMS can be slow during morning rush. The bridge stretch is the main pinch point.

board_landmark: Ajah Roundabout Bus Stop (near Abraham Adesanya Estate gate)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Lekki or CMS. Tell the conductor 'Lekki' or 'CMS'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Lekki Phase 1 Gate and wait for a faster CMS-bound bus if needed.
notes: Some buses go directly to CMS from Ajah — ask the conductor before boarding.

board_landmark: Lekki Phase 1 Gate, CMS-bound bus stop
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to CMS or Lagos Island. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'Marina'.
alight_landmark: CMS Bus Stop, opposite First Bank, Lagos Island
alight_instruction: Drop at CMS — the bus goes through Ozumba Mbadiwe and Victoria Island before arriving.
notes: The Lekki-VI corridor is notorious for go-slow. Friday evenings are the worst. Leave by 6am or after 10am.

board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Oshodi. Tell the conductor 'Oshodi'.
alight_landmark: Oshodi Terminal, near the BRT platform
alight_instruction: Drop at Oshodi and walk to the Ikeja-bound bus parks.

board_landmark: Obafemi Awolowo Way Bus Stop (in front of Computer Village gate)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Oshodi. Tell the conductor 'Oshodi'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Oshodi and walk to the BRT boarding area.

board_landmark: Ketu BRT Bus Stop, Ikorodu Road
board_instruction: Board the BRT bus to TBS or CMS. Pay at the kiosk — do not pay the conductor.
alight_instruction: Ride to TBS. CMS is a 5-minute keke ride or walk from TBS Bus Stop.
notes: The BRT from Ketu is direct and avoids the Ojota/Palmgrove go-slow. Buy your ticket at the platform — conductors do not collect cash.

board_landmark: Mile 2 Bus Stop, CMS-bound side (near Cele junction)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to CMS or Apapa Road. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'Marina'.
alight_landmark: CMS Bus Stop, Lagos Island — opposite First Bank
alight_instruction: Drop at CMS. The bus goes past Apapa Road and over the bridge. Watch for your stop.
notes: The road from Mile 2 to CMS via the Apapa bridge can be slow. Early morning (before 7am) is usually clear.

board_landmark: Iyana Ipaja Bus Stop (Command Road junction)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Oshodi. Tell the conductor 'Oshodi' or 'Under-Bridge'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Oshodi — the bus terminates here. You'll be right at the terminal.
notes: Danfos to Oshodi run continuously from Iyana Ipaja. The Agege Motor Road stretch can slow down in the afternoon.

board_landmark: Apapa Bus Stop, near Creek Road junction
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to CMS. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'Marina'.
alight_instruction: Short ride across the Apapa bridge. Drop at CMS — you'll see the First Bank building.
notes: Apapa to CMS is one of the shortest trips on this list — but Apapa traffic can make it feel longer. Danfos are very frequent.

board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Yaba or Ojuelegba. Tell the conductor 'Yaba' or 'Ojuelegba'.
alight_landmark: Yaba Bus Stop, near Herbert Macaulay junction
alight_instruction: Drop at Yaba junction. You'll see the pedestrian bridge and the market on your right.
notes: Direct danfos between Mushin and Yaba run all day. It's a short, busy route.

board_landmark: Palmgrove Bus Stop, Ikorodu Road (near Jibowu junction)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Ojuelegba. Tell the conductor 'Ojuelegba' or 'Ojue'.
alight_landmark: Ojuelegba Bus Stop, under the bridge
alight_instruction: Drop at Ojuelegba and cross to the CMS-bound side under the bridge.

board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to CMS. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'Marina'.
alight_instruction: Drop at CMS near the overhead bridge — end of the line.
notes: If you catch a direct danfo from Palmgrove to CMS, take it — saves a connection.

board_landmark: Ojodu Berger Bus Stop (Lagos-Ibadan Expressway service road)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Ikeja. Tell the conductor 'Ikeja' or 'Secretariat'.
alight_landmark: Ikeja Along Junction or Secretariat Bus Stop
alight_instruction: Drop at Ikeja Along or the Secretariat — both are central Ikeja.
notes: Berger to Ikeja is a straight shot down Lagos-Ibadan Expressway. Quick when traffic is moving.

board_landmark: Ojota BRT Bus Stop, Ikorodu Road
board_instruction: Board the BRT bus to TBS or CMS. Pay at the kiosk on the platform.
alight_instruction: Ride through Maryland, Palmgrove, Yaba, and Costain to TBS. Walk or take a keke to CMS.
notes: The BRT is the fastest way from Ojota to Lagos Island. Avoids the notorious Ikorodu Road go-slow.

board_instruction: Board a danfo to CMS or Lagos Island. Tell the conductor 'CMS'.
alight_instruction: Drop at CMS and walk to the TBS BRT platform nearby.
notes: This is a long multi-leg journey. Budget at least 2 hours and carry enough cash.

board_landmark: TBS BRT Platform (near CMS, Lagos Island)
board_instruction: Board the BRT to Oshodi. Pay at the kiosk.
alight_instruction: Ride to Oshodi Terminal. Cross to the Ikeja-bound danfo bus park.

board_landmark: Eko Hotel Bus Stop, Ahmadu Bello Way (VI)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to CMS or TBS. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'TBS'.
alight_instruction: Drop at TBS and cross to the BRT platform on the median.

board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Oshodi. Tell the conductor 'Oshodi'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Oshodi Terminal. The journey goes past Alaba and Isolo.
notes: The Festac-Oshodi route via Mile 2 is well-served. Avoid Isolo Road during rush hours.

board_landmark: Abule Egba Bus Stop (Abeokuta Expressway, near the mosque)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Agege or Pen Cinema. Tell the conductor 'Agege' or 'Pen Cinema'.
alight_landmark: Agege Bus Stop, near Pen Cinema
alight_instruction: Drop at Agege and look for the Ikeja-bound danfo across the road.

board_instruction: Board a danfo to Ikeja or Oshodi. Tell the conductor 'Ikeja' or 'Along'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ikeja Along — it's a busy junction with shops on both sides.
notes: Agege to Ikeja is a direct route. Buses run frequently throughout the day.

board_landmark: Sangotedo Bus Stop (Monastery Road, near Novare Shoprite)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Ajah. Tell the conductor 'Ajah' or 'Roundabout'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ajah Roundabout. Cross to the Lagos Island / CMS-bound bus stop.

board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to CMS or Lagos Island. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'Marina'. Confirm the bus goes through Lekki and VI.
alight_landmark: CMS Bus Stop, Lagos Island — near First Bank
alight_instruction: Ride through Lekki Phase 1, Ozumba Mbadiwe, and Victoria Island to reach CMS. Drop at the overhead bridge stop.
notes: Sangotedo to CMS is a long journey. Budget 2+ hours during peak. The Lekki-Epe Expressway is notoriously congested by 7am.

board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to CMS or Lagos Island. Tell the conductor 'CMS' or 'Marina'.
alight_landmark: CMS Bus Stop, Lagos Island — near First Bank
alight_instruction: Drop at CMS when you see the overhead bridge. Cross to the Island side if continuing.
notes: Traffic through Carter Bridge or Third Mainland can be heavy from 7–9am and 4–7pm.

board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Victoria Island. Tell the conductor 'VI' or 'Bar Beach'.
alight_landmark: Victoria Island — Eko Hotel roundabout or Ahmadu Bello Way
alight_instruction: Drop anywhere on Ahmadu Bello Way or at the Eko Hotel area, depending on your destination.

board_instruction: Board a danfo heading to Lekki Phase 1. Tell the conductor 'Lekki' or 'Admiralty'.
alight_landmark: Lekki Phase 1 Gate Bus Stop — opposite the Admiralty Way junction
alight_instruction: Drop at the Lekki Phase 1 gate. The bus goes straight along the Lekki-Epe Expressway.
notes: Lekki traffic is heavy from 7–10am and 5–8pm. Allow extra time in peak hours.

board_instruction: Board a keke heading to your street or close within Lekki Phase 1.
alight_instruction: Tell the keke driver your specific street or landmark within the estate.

board_landmark: Surulere Bus Stop (Adeniran Ogunsanya or Kilo)
board_instruction: Board a danfo heading toward Ilasa or Idi-Araba. Tell the conductor 'Ilasa'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ilasa junction. From here you can connect to Idi-Araba and LUTH.

board_landmark: Ilasa — other side of the overhead bridge
board_instruction: Board a keke heading to Idi-Araba. Tell the driver 'Idi-Araba'.
alight_instruction: Drop at your destination in Idi-Araba.

board_instruction: Board a bus heading to Oshodi. Tell the conductor 'Oshodi'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Oshodi.
notes: Avoid peak hours — Oshodi traffic can be very heavy.

board_instruction: Board a bus heading to Ikeja Under Bridge. Tell the conductor 'Ikeja Under Bridge'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ikeja Under Bridge.

board_instruction: Board a keke heading to Canoe bus stop. Tell the driver 'Canoe'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Canoe Bus Stop.

board_instruction: Board a keke heading to Airport Junction. Tell the driver 'Airport Junction'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Airport Junction. Board a bus going to Ikeja from here.

board_instruction: Board a bus heading to Ikeja. Tell the conductor 'Ikeja Along' or 'Ikeja Under Bridge'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ikeja Under Bridge.

board_instruction: Board a keke heading to Ilasa. Tell the driver 'Ilasa'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ilasa. Cross to the other side using the overhead bridge.

board_instruction: Board a keke heading to Ogba. Tell the driver 'Ogba Bus Park, Ogba'.
alight_landmark: Ogba Bus Park Bus Stop, Ogba
alight_instruction: Drop at Ogba Bus Park. Cross the road and walk toward where the buses are lined up.

board_instruction: Board a bus going to Ojota. Tell the conductor 'Ojota'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ojota. Walk a little to the front to board your next bus.

board_landmark: Ojota Bus Stop — walk a little to the front from where you dropped
board_instruction: Board a bus going to Ojuelegba. Tell the conductor 'Ojuelegba'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ojuelegba. Ask around for the Idi-Araba or LUTH bus.

board_instruction: Ask around for the Idi-Araba or LUTH bus. Tell the conductor 'LUTH' or 'Idi-Araba'.
alight_instruction: Drop at LUTH gate.

board_instruction: Board a bus heading to Ojuelegba. Tell the conductor 'Ojuelegba'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ojuelegba. Head to the garage for your next bus.

board_instruction: Board a bus going to Ojota. Tell the conductor 'Ojota'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ojota. Cross the road and climb the overhead bridge to the other side. Walk toward the garage.

board_landmark: Ojota garage — after crossing the overhead bridge to the other side
board_instruction: Board a bus going to Ogba. Tell the conductor 'Ogba'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ogba. Cross to the other side.

board_landmark: Ogba — other side of the road after dropping
board_instruction: Ask around for the Obawole bus and drop at Jojo. Or board a keke heading to Jojo.
alight_instruction: Drop at Jojo.
notes: Danfo fare is ₦400–₦500. Keke fare is ₦500–₦600.

board_instruction: Board a bike to KayFarm Gate. Tell the rider 'KayFarm Gate'.
alight_instruction: Drop at KayFarm Gate.

board_instruction: Board a bus going to Ikeja. Tell the conductor 'Ikeja Under Bridge'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ikeja Under Bridge. It's a long walk to the Ogba buses — if you know where Oriamo's Carlcare is, walk toward that direction and ask for the Ogba bus park.

board_landmark: Ikeja Under Bridge — walk toward Oriamo's Carlcare and ask for the Ogba bus park
board_instruction: Board a bus going to Ogba. Tell the conductor 'Ogba'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ogba. Cross to the other side.

board_landmark: Ojota Bus Stop — walk a little to the front from where you dropped
board_instruction: Board a bus going to Yaba. Tell the conductor 'Yaba'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Yaba or Jibowu. Board the campus bus to UNILAG from here.

board_instruction: Board the campus shuttle to UNILAG. Tell the driver 'UNILAG' or 'University Road'. The shuttle goes through the main gate.
alight_instruction: Drop at the main gate or tell the driver your stop inside campus.

board_instruction: Board a bus heading to Yaba. Tell the driver 'Yaba' or 'Jibowu'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Jibowu.

board_instruction: Board a bus going to Ojota. Tell the conductor 'Ojota'.
alight_instruction: Drop at Ojota. Cross the road and climb the overhead bridge to the other side. Walk toward the garage.
